name: GuildAI
author: guildora
description: AI-powered Discord server administration assistant with safety controls.

permissions.label: Read members
permissions.description: Read member profiles and roles for AI context

permissions.label: Modify members
permissions.description: Modify member profiles and roles via AI actions

permissions.label: Read messages
permissions.description: Access chat history for AI context

permissions.label: Send messages
permissions.description: Send messages and announcements via AI actions

permissions.label: Manage roles
permissions.description: Manage Discord roles and permissions via AI actions

configFields.label: Bot Name
configFields.description: Custom name for the AI bot (default: GuildAI).

configFields.label: Community Name
configFields.description: Name of your community (used by the AI bot for identity).

configFields.label: Default Language
configFields.description: Bot's default language for greetings and initial messages.

configFields.label: Timezone
configFields.description: Timezone for date/time context (e.g. Europe/Berlin, America/New_York).

configFields.label: AI Provider
configFields.description: Which AI provider to use.

configFields.label: API Key
configFields.description: API key for the selected provider (stored encrypted).

configFields.label: Model
configFields.description: Model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gpt-4o).

configFields.label: Max Tokens per Response
configFields.description: Maximum tokens per AI response.

configFields.label: Allowed Chat Roles
configFields.description: Comma-separated roles that can use the chat (e.g. moderator,admin,superadmin).

configFields.label: Allowed Action Roles
configFields.description: Comma-separated roles that can confirm actions (e.g. admin,superadmin).

configFields.label: Rate Limit (messages/minute)
configFields.description: Max messages per user per minute.

configFields.label: Role-specific Rate Limits (JSON)
configFields.description: Optional JSON object: {"user": 5, "moderator": 20, "admin": 50}.

configFields.label: Confirmation Timeout (seconds)
configFields.description: Seconds before a pending action expires.

configFields.label: Enabled Actions
configFields.description: Comma-separated action types the AI may propose.

configFields.label: Skill Page Access Roles
configFields.description: Comma-separated roles that can view the Skill Library page (e.g. moderator,admin,superadmin).

configFields.label: Skill Management Roles
configFields.description: Comma-separated roles that can create, edit, and delete skills (e.g. admin,superadmin).

configFields.label: AI Skill Creation Roles
configFields.description: Comma-separated roles that can confirm AI-proposed skill creation (e.g. admin,superadmin).

configFields.label: Read-Only Mode (Testing)
configFields.description: When enabled, actions are simulated but not executed.

configFields.label: Action Logging
configFields.description: Log all executed actions (90-day retention).

configFields.label: Extended Context
configFields.description: Custom context provided to the AI in every conversation.

configFields.label: Extended Personality
configFields.description: Custom personality and tone instructions for the AI bot.

configFields.label: Discord Context Messages
configFields.description: Maximum number of message pairs kept in Discord chat context before summarization (default: 10).

configFields.label: AI Chat Channel ID
configFields.description: Discord channel ID to use as AI chat channel. Leave empty to disable.

configFields.label: Auto-execute Actions in Chat Channel
configFields.description: Deprecated — safe actions are always auto-executed in the Discord channel. Destructive actions require the Hub.

configFields.label: Klipy API Key
configFields.description: API key for GIF/sticker/clip integration (get one at partner.klipy.com).

installNotes: Set your AI provider API key in Settings before using the chat.
